Page 3 RSC + table + chart + data-loader extension lands in 6.1c-ii — fresh session, consumes this algorithm.

              NEW DEPENDENCIES packages/shared: @turf/boolean-point-in-polygon ^7.1.0 + @turf/helpers ^7.1.0 + @turf/length ^7.1.0 + @turf/line-split ^7.1.0 — ~60KB tree-shaken, all MIT. 19 packages added to lockfile total (4 direct + transitive).

              DECISION LOCKED docs/DECISIONS_LOG.md: Coverage Clip Library Choice = narrow @turf/* modules. Rejects full @turf/turf bundle (~200KB), @turf/intersect (wrong primitive — polygon × polygon not line × polygon), and pure-math hand-rolled (~250 LOC + correctness risk). Locked as the SINGLE source of truth for line × polygon clipping across Marine-Guardian — Page 3 + Per Area Report + future Quarterly Report MUST consume this module.

Two inline corrections during verification: (1) no-unsafe-assignment on `coords[0]` after Array.isArray narrow — TypeScript narrows `unknown` to `any[]` not `unknown[]` so indexed access leaks `any`; fix via `(coords as unknown[])[0]` cast, same precedent as 6.1a/6.1b. (2) turf.lineSplit returns EMPTY FeatureCollection when there's no intersection (fully inside OR fully outside); initial implementation missed every fully-inside patrol; fix added a fallback that classifies via first-vertex booleanPointInPolygon. Pre-merge AND post-merge verification: shared typecheck 0 / shared lint 0 strict --max-warnings 0 / shared 137 tests pass (108→137 = +29 net new) / web typecheck 0 / web lint 0 / web 376 tests unchanged / jobs 122 unchanged / storage 12 unchanged.
